overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt exploring Beauclair Palace in Toussaint. The character walks along scenic terraces overlooking the valley, enters a Gothic chapel interior with vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows, and continues through covered colonnades during warm golden hour lighting.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the palace terrace overlooking the scenic valley of Toussaint

decorative stone balustrade with carved details
expansive view of Toussaint valley with rolling hills and distant mountains
tall palace spires with red tiled roofs
ornate stone furniture on the terrace

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands on a wide palace terrace overlooking the scenic Toussaint valley during golden hour. The stone balcony railings frame the distant mountains and red-roofed towers while the character walks forward along the paved surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate stone bridge with statues leading to palace entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt crosses the stone bridge lined with classical statues approaching the Gothic palace entrance

entered.detail: elevated stone walkway with ornate arched railings
classical marble statues of robed figures lining the bridge
elaborate Gothic facade with pointed arches and carved stonework

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an ornate stone bridge lined with classical statues. Geralt walks across the cobblestone surface toward the Gothic palace entrance while the red roof towers shift to the left side of the frame.

events.description: Geralt enters the palace interior through a large Gothic arched doorway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the Gothic arch entrance into the chapel interior where a woman in white stands near the doorway

entered.detail: large pointed Gothic archway with intricate stone tracery
high-ceilinged interior space with stone walls and religious architecture
polished stone flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the palace interior through an ornate Gothic archway. The lighting shifts to a softer mixed quality as he steps onto marble floors inside the chapel entrance, where a woman in white stands near the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic chapel interior with vaulted ceilings

events.description: interior lighting becomes darker and more diffused as Geralt moves deeper into the chapel

agents.ego_description: Geralt explores the chapel interior, walking past statues and looking up at the stained glass windows

tall arched windows with colorful stained glass panels
life-sized marble statue of a robed figure in a niche
ornate wrought iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the Gothic chapel, Geralt walks beneath soaring vaulted ceilings past marble statues and ornate iron chandeliers. Sunlight filters through tall stained glass windows creating colored patterns on the marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with mountain views

events.description: Geralt exits the chapel interior through stained glass doors into the covered exterior walkway

agents.ego_description: Geralt exits the chapel and walks along a covered colonnade, passing another person in colorful clothing

notable_agents.action: man in blue and orange outfit walking past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large arched exit with intricate stained glass panels
covered walkway with stone columns and Gothic arches
tall ornate stone pillars supporting the walkway roof
mountain range visible through the colonnade arches

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the chapel through stained glass doors into a covered colonnade with stone columns. The lighting returns to warm natural sunlight as he walks along the cobblestone path, passing a man in colorful clothing while mountain views appear through the arches.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to upper palace entrance

events.description: Geralt begins ascending the stone stairs toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the colonnade and begins ascending a long stone staircase toward an upper entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending toward the palace upper level
Gothic arched doorway at the top of the stairs
scenic view of trees and mountains visible from the stairs

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered colonnade, Geralt approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase. The path leads upward toward a Gothic arched entrance while scenic landscape views open up to the right, with trees and distant mountains visible in the golden light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched terraces of a palace into a grand Gothic interior before returning to the golden light of an outdoor colonnade. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide stone balcony overlooking the Toussaint valley and its red-roofed towers, moving across an ornate bridge lined with classical statues toward the palace entrance. As he passes through a Gothic archway, the scene shifts from bright sunlight to the soft, filtered light of a chapel interior, where he walks across marble floors beneath soaring vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows. The camera then follows him as he exits through glass doors into a covered colonnade, where the lighting returns to a warm glow while he passes a colorful figure along a cobblestone path. Finally, the movement leads him up a wide stone staircase toward another arched entrance, as the view opens up once more to the distant mountains and trees in the golden hour light.
